content.fact_text: Implementation of Product and Inventory domain data schemas and SKU-based validation logic.

provenance_data.behaviour: Defines schema validation and domain-specific state mutation logic for Product and Inventory. Implements non-negative stock enforcement and atomic state transition validation.
interfaces: validateInventoryMutation(current: Inventory, totalChange: number, reservedChange: number): { success: boolean, data?: Inventory, error?: string }
provenance_data.utility: Provides critical domain validation logic for product catalog and inventory stock management, ensuring data integrity at the domain layer.
